chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-656 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-657 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-658 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-659 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-660 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-661 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-662 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-663 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-664 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-665 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-666 of 2019 Crl.Bail.Appln.No.S-667 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of all Misc.Applications. 20.04.2020. Mr. Amanullah Luhur, Advocate for applicant. Mr.Muhammad Noonari, D.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The applicant has been admitted to bail by this Court subject to his furnishing solvent surety in sum of Rs.500,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount in each case to the satisfaction of learned trial Court, such surety according to him he could not arrange for in 12 cases, therefore, by way of instant application he has sought for its reduction, which is opposed by learned D.P.G for the State. Apparently, the surety is huge one, which according to the applicant is beyond his capacity to furnish in 12 cases individually, it is therefore reduced to Rs.200,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount in each case, to the satisfaction of learned trial Court. The captioned applications are disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
